title: DOD contractors you are welcome in our chat. ransomware incident

victim.name: DOD contractors you are welcome in our chat.

extortion.description: Hello [visitor_name]! We got some contractors of US Department of Defense here. They said SpaceX, Locheed Martin and Boing documents which is their legal property cost 20k usd. So we dont think like that and there our last warning. 500k usd at least: you will pay or all data…
